creator: dfilter@FreeBSD.ORG
text:
Author: miwi
Date: Sun Aug  5 08:42:59 2012
New Revision: 302101
URL: http://svn.freebsd.org/changeset/ports/302101

Log:
  - Update to 0.07
  
  PR:		169886
  Submitted by:	maintainer

Modified:
  head/www/p5-WebService-Linode/Makefile   (contents, props changed)
  head/www/p5-WebService-Linode/distinfo   (contents, props changed)

Modified: head/www/p5-WebService-Linode/Makefile
==============================================================================
--- head/www/p5-WebService-Linode/Makefile	Sun Aug  5 08:37:14 2012	(r302100)
+++ head/www/p5-WebService-Linode/Makefile	Sun Aug  5 08:42:59 2012	(r302101)
@@ -6,15 +6,18 @@
 #
 
 PORTNAME=	WebService-Linode
-PORTVERSION=	0.05
+PORTVERSION=	0.07
 CATEGORIES=	www
 MASTER_SITES=	CPAN
 MASTER_SITE_SUBDIR=	WebService
 PKGNAMEPREFIX=	p5-
 
-MAINTAINER=	gslin@gslin.org
+MAINTAINER=	perl@FreeBSD.org
 COMMENT=	Perl Interface to the Linode.com API
 
+LICENSE=	ART10 GPLv1
+LICENSE_COMB=	dual
+
 RUN_DEPENDS=	p5-Crypt-SSLeay>0:${PORTSDIR}/security/p5-Crypt-SSLeay \
 		p5-JSON>0:${PORTSDIR}/converters/p5-JSON \
 		p5-libwww>0:${PORTSDIR}/www/p5-libwww
